Class ItemSprite

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.image.ImageView
sprites.ItemSprite
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class ItemSprite extends javafx.scene.image.ImageView
Represents an item sprite.

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private BaseItem
    item
    The item logical object associated with this sprite.
    private double
    mouseAnchorX
    The X coordinate anchor point for dragging the sprite.
    private double
    mouseAnchorY
    The Y coordinate anchor point for dragging the sprite.
    private boolean
    mousePressed
    A flag indicating if the mouse is currently pressed on the sprite.
    private boolean
    movable
    A flag indicating if the sprite can be dragged by the user.
    private BaseCounter
    previousCounter
    The previous counter the sprite was on before being moved.
    private Room
    previousRoom
    The previous room the sprite was in before being moved.
    private double
    previousX
    The previous X coordinate before the sprite was moved.
    private double
    previousY
    The previous Y coordinate before the sprite was moved.
    private javafx.scene.control.Tooltip
    tooltip
    The tooltip displayed when hovering over the sprite.

    • item

      private BaseItem item
      The item logical object associated with this sprite.

    • mouseAnchorX

      private double mouseAnchorX
      The X coordinate anchor point for dragging the sprite.

    • mouseAnchorY

      private double mouseAnchorY
      The Y coordinate anchor point for dragging the sprite.

    • previousX

      private double previousX
      The previous X coordinate before the sprite was moved.

    • previousY

      private double previousY
      The previous Y coordinate before the sprite was moved.

    • previousRoom

      private Room previousRoom
      The previous room the sprite was in before being moved.

    • previousCounter

      private BaseCounter previousCounter
      The previous counter the sprite was on before being moved.

    • tooltip

      The tooltip displayed when hovering over the sprite.

    • movable

      private boolean movable
      A flag indicating if the sprite can be dragged by the user.

    • mousePressed

      private boolean mousePressed
      A flag indicating if the mouse is currently pressed on the sprite.

  • Constructor Details

    • ItemSprite

      public ItemSprite(ItemSpriteType itemSpriteType)
      Create an item sprite which player can interact with on the screen.
      Parameters:
      itemSpriteType - receive ItemType Enum to create the item of the sprite.

      public BaseItem getItem()
      Getter method of item.
      Returns:
      BaseItem object of the ItemSprite.

    • setItem

      public void setItem(BaseItem item)
      Setter method of item.

      item - BaseItem to set.

    • setToAnchored

      private void setToAnchored(double mouseX, double mouseY)
      Set ItemSprite layout x and layout y such that mouse position relative to ItemSprite is constant.
      Parameters:
      mouseX - Current mouse X position relative to application's window.
      mouseY - Current mouse Y position relative to application's window.

    • setToWithinBound

      public void setToWithinBound(BaseCounter counter)
      Set ItemSprite layout x and layout y such that ItemSprite contains within bound of a BaseCounter.
      Parameters:
      counter - The counter to set ItemSprite within counter's bound.

    • setPreviousCounter

      public void setPreviousCounter(BaseCounter counter)
      Sets the previous counter for this item sprite.
      Parameters:
      counter - the counter to set as previous

    • updateItemAppearance

      public void updateItemAppearance()
      Updating the image of the sprite to match of that the item.

    • isMovable

      public boolean isMovable()
      Checks if the item sprite is movable.
      Returns:
      true if movable, false otherwise

    • setMovable

      public void setMovable(boolean movable)
      Sets whether the item sprite is movable.
      Parameters:
      movable - true to make it movable, false otherwise
